subject: [PATCH RFC v3 3/6] mm: rename get_user_page_vma_remote() to get_user_page_lookup_vma()

2026-07-17.patch_summary: This patch renames the function get_user_page_vma_remote() to get_user_page_lookup_vma(). The renamed function still faults in a page at a given address and looks up the VMA that covers it, but its name now more accurately reflects its purpose. This change is part of a series of patches aimed at cleaning up the namespace for adding a variant of this function where the caller already has the VMA. The patch updates several files to use the new function name, including arch-specific code and mm/memory.c.
